purpose: Materialize event-time, post-latency, visible-book long and short quote-path outcomes for every valid Round 73 v4 feature anchor without selecting shocks, models, thresholds, or profitable rows.

source_basis.title: Binance USD-M Futures: How to manage a local order book correctly
source_basis.used_fact: The snapshot is bridged to buffered diff events, each subsequent pu must equal the prior u, event quantities are absolute, and zero removes a level.

source_basis.title: Binance USD-M Futures REST Market Data: Order Book
source_basis.used_fact: The public order book exposes price and quantity levels, supports a 1000-level snapshot, and excludes RPI liquidity.

source_basis.title: Deep Limit Order Book Forecasting
source_basis.used_fact: Forecast quality does not imply actionability; complete-transaction operational evaluation is required.

time_contract.actual_entry_state: first non-stale synchronized depth state whose receipt is at or after requested entry time
time_contract.requested_exit_time: actual entry-state receipt time plus holding horizon
time_contract.actual_exit_state: first non-stale synchronized depth state whose receipt is at or after requested exit time

instrument_contract.quantity_reference: reference quote notional divided by the last synchronized pre-decision book mid
instrument_contract.quantity_rounding: floor to captured market quantity step so reference exposure is never rounded upward
instrument_contract.funding_boundary_crossing_policy: option ineligible until exact settlement cash-flow evidence is implemented

book_walk.long_entry: buy base quantity by walking entry asks from best to worst
book_walk.long_exit: sell the same base quantity by walking exit bids from best to worst
book_walk.short_entry: sell base quantity by walking entry bids from best to worst
book_walk.short_exit: buy back the same base quantity by walking exit asks from best to worst
book_walk.partial_capacity_policy: option ineligible; partial quantity is never scaled into a full-fill result

cost_contract.charge_base: average of absolute entry and exit walked quote notionals
cost_contract.charge_quote_formula: 12 / 10000 times the average of entry and exit quote notional
cost_contract.net_payoff_formula_long: exit bid proceeds minus entry ask cost minus charge quote
cost_contract.net_payoff_formula_short: entry bid proceeds minus exit ask cost minus charge quote
cost_contract.runtime_fee_policy: Use the larger of this frozen reserve and verified account-specific round-trip taker fees plus the separately frozen adverse reserve.

path_risk_contract.path_states: every non-stale synchronized depth state from actual entry through actual exit
path_risk_contract.mark_to_liquidation_value: walk the then-current closing side for the fixed base quantity and apply the same round-trip charge formula
path_risk_contract.maximum_adverse_excursion_bps: minimum net mark-to-liquidation payoff bps on the path
path_risk_contract.maximum_favorable_excursion_bps: maximum net mark-to-liquidation payoff bps on the path
path_risk_contract.maximum_spread_bps: maximum top-of-book spread observed on the path
path_risk_contract.minimum_exit_side_capacity_ratio: minimum top-20 closing-side quote capacity divided by required closing quote value

downstream_split_and_selection.shock_ratio_threshold: maximum of 3.0 and the training-fold symbol-specific 99th percentile
